items.name: polymarket-copy-trading-bot
items.description: polymarket copytrading bot A TypeScript/Node bot that mirrors a target Polymarket trader’s activity and places similar orders from your account

items.name: codex-session-patcher
items.description: A lightweight Python tool to clean AI refusal responses from Codex CLI session files

items.name: positioning-plugin
items.description: Claude Code plugin: structured positioning statement exercise for startups and teams

items.name: opencli-rs-skill
items.description: The perfect companion for ClaudeCode/OpenClaw/Agent, Give your AI Agent the ability to reach information across the entire web, fetching real-time data from Bilibili, Zhihu, Twitter/X, YouTube, Weibo, Reddit, Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, Notion, Cursor and 55+ platforms with natural language — reusing your Chrome login session, no API keys needed.

items.name: Quitty
items.description: Quitty is a lightweight macOS utility designed to help power-users monitor, manage, and instantly terminate running applications. Lives right in your menu bar.

items.name: blueprint3d-modern
items.description: A modern TypeScript-based rewrite of blueprint3d — faster, cleaner, and actively maintained.

items.name: OrgKernel
items.description: Open-source trust layer for AI agents — cryptographic agent identity (Ed25519), instance-scoped execution tokens, SHA-256 hash-chained audit logging, and enterprise SSO/SCIM federation. The security foundation powering every agent in the Metaprise AURA platform.

items.name: team-helper
items.description: 基于激活码的ChatGPT Team邀请管理系统，支持自动邀请、支付集成、库存管理等功能。

items.name: dotgears
items.description: We develop and publish bite-sized mobile games. Our games are light-hearted, easy to understand, kid-friendly, extremely difficult and incredibly fun.

items.name: show
items.description: 面向中小理发店、社区店、夫妻店的一体化轻量客户管理工具。

items.name: PlantOntology
items.description: The worlds first open-source plant knowledge graph ? 10,888+ species with OpenCrab semantic architecture

items.name: turboquant-pytorch
items.description: From-scratch PyTorch implementation of Google's TurboQuant (ICLR 2026) for LLM KV cache compression. 5x compression at 3-bit with 99.5% attention fidelity.

items.name: qq-farm-bot-vision
items.description: QQ经典农场机器人（AI视觉版本）

items.name: token-enhancer
items.description: A local proxy that strips web pages down to clean text before they enter your AI agent's context window. 704K tokens → 2.6K tokens. No LLM required.

items.name: cap-x
items.description: A Framework for Benchmarking and Improving Coding Agents for Robot Manipulation

items.name: Mano-P
items.description: Mano-P 是一个开源 GUI-VLA 项目，支持在 Mac mini/MacBook 上或通过算力棒本地运行推理，实现纯视觉驱动的跨平台 GUI 自动化操作。数据完全本地处理，支持复杂多步骤任务规划与执行。Mano-P: Open-source GUI-VLA agent for edge devices. #1 on OSWorld (specialized, 58.2%). Runs locally on Apple M4 Mac mini/MacBook — no data leaves your device.

items.name: LabNote
items.description: We have made LabNote into a markdown desktop editor that is locally-first, friendly to both Chinese and English, structurally clear, and maintainable in the long term. It comes from our practice of rewriting MarkText.

items.description: 防猝死，要长寿
